name: obsidian-gemini-helper
description: AI-powered assistant using Google Gemini with File Search RAG capabilities

scripts.dev:langfuse: npm run generate:builtin-okf && node esbuild.config.mjs langfuse
scripts.build: npm run generate:builtin-okf && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.build:langfuse: npm run generate:builtin-okf && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production langfuse
scripts.preversion: npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: takeshy
